Polyester.impact: Microplastic pollution and fossil fuel production

Recycled Polyester.impact: Reuses existing plastic, reducing demand for new petroleum production

Cotton.impact: High pesticide use and heavy water consumption

Organic Cotton.impact: Minimal pesticide use and better soil management

Hemp.impact: Highly renewable plant that requires minimal pesticides and improves soil health

Linen.impact: Made from flax plant requiring minimal pesticides and processing

Tencel.impact: Closed-loop production using sustainably sourced wood pulp

Bamboo.impact: Fast-growing renewable plant but processing can require chemicals

Nylon.impact: Fossil fuel based fiber that sheds microplastics

Recycled Nylon.impact: Reduces new petroleum production by recycling plastic waste

Wool.impact: Natural fiber but livestock contributes methane emissions

Merino Wool.impact: Natural biodegradable fiber but livestock farming impacts environment

Silk.impact: Natural fiber but sericulture is resource intensive

Acrylic.impact: Petroleum-based synthetic fiber that sheds microplastics

Rayon / Viscose.impact: Semi-synthetic fiber from wood pulp requiring chemical processing

Modal.impact: Beech tree fiber with more efficient processing than rayon

Spandex (Elastane).impact: Petroleum-based stretch fiber with high microplastic pollution

Cashmere.impact: Goat grazing can lead to land degradation

Alpaca.impact: Low environmental footprint fiber but transportation emissions matter

Angora.impact: Rabbit fiber with potential animal welfare concerns

Acetate.impact: Wood pulp fiber chemically processed during production

Cupro.impact: Regenerated fiber made from cotton waste but requires chemical processing

Ramie.impact: Plant fiber with low pesticide use but energy intensive processing

Jute.impact: Natural plant fiber requiring minimal fertilizers

Kapok.impact: Naturally growing tree fiber requiring minimal farming inputs

Banana Fiber.impact: Uses agricultural waste from banana plants

Pineapple Fiber (Piñatex).impact: Made from pineapple leaf waste from agriculture
